title: FIH-deficient bone marrow-derived macrophages
author: Ma, Jingyi
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Bone marrow-derived macrophages (BMDMs) isolated from WT and FIH-/- mice treated with LPS were subjected to RNA sequencing.
steps_raw: Bone marrow-derived macrophages (BMDMs) isolated from WT and FIH-/- mice treated with LPS were subjected to RNA sequencing.
